of chests that probably contain food or supplies here. To the west a curtain can
be seen hanging down that can be closed for added privacy.
name: Kitchen

desc:
This is the front entry hall of the farmhouse. It serves as a place for the
family to hang up their coats and wipe their feet. There are some pictures on
the wall, and a kitchen visible through the doorway north. West a dining area
can be seen. It is a large home, fit to house many.
name: Front Hall

desc:
Entering this room from the front hall directly east, it is noticeable that this
is where food is eaten. There is a cupboard with plates, cups and eating
utensils. The floor is made of wood, polished to a shine. There is a small
window here, which looks out over the front yard and to the barn.
name: Family Dining Room

desc:
This is a quite dirty animal pen for common farm animals. Tracks of pigs, cows
and hens can be seen on the ground. There is a muddy pool in one corner of the
fenced area, where the pigs like to stay, and a small wooden barn where the
animals can seek shelter. To the north, behind the fence, is the farmhouse, a
large building with many rooms.
name: Animal Pen

desc:
This is a very homely room. On the back wall there is a rather large bed with
thick, soft blankets and a wooden bedside table next to it. A candle has been
placed there to give light when needed. On the northern wall of this bedroom a
narrow ladder can be seen leading upstairs. South a window shows a glimpse of
the path leading to the farmhouse.
name: Bedroom

desc:
This room has been divided into two halves by a hanging curtain of vines, with a
single bed on each side. A small ladder can be seen leading downstairs into the
master bedroom below. Judging by the toys and small articles of clothing that
are scattered around, this must be where the children sleep.
name: The Bedroom Loft

desc:
This small musty room is dug from the earth, with no stone walls. There are
shelves that line the walls, and some hooks in the ceiling to hang some meat on.
The shelves hold some foods in jars, preserved from the farm garden. There is a
small sturdy ladder leaning against one wall, which leads out of this cellar.
name: A Musty Food Cellar

desc:
A shallow depression in the ground, together with a wide crack in the mountain
wall, forms a small cave. Once beneath the low overhang, the roof is high enough
to stand up straight. All throughout the cave, several piles of bones lie
littered. In a few placed dark patches stains the rocky floor.
name: Cave in the Mountainside

desc:
This cavern has been only recently extended and carved, just like the tunnels
that lead south and west. The ceiling is black with soot, from the constant
cooking fires. Iron bars guard the way north, while to the west and south are
badly dug tunnels, barely supported on wooden beams.
name: Spacious Cavern

desc:
From the Misty Mountains runs a spur of hills for some miles, creating a steep
climb up to the top of Dol Baran in the north. Eastwards, the land drops into a
sudden brush-covered dale, accessible from its southern side, but not from here.
Here, the land is much like that to the south, although it is sloping and with
frequent patches of rocky boulders that have fallen from above.
name: Below a Spur of Hills

desc:
The ground here is soft and rich, allowing many varieties of grass to grow in
the plains. Thin and short, green grass slowly gives way to the taller, waving
stalks of brown. A small trail of trampled grass leads to the north, where a
spur of hills runs off from the southern Misty Mountains.
name: Grassy Plains

desc:
Tall strands of undergrowth choke the surroundings, blocking passage in all
directions except to the south. The shade from the slope to the east, combined
with the dense growth, creates an environment where wildlife can flourish. In
the few spots of earth that is not covered by growth or fallen bramble, the
footprints of some large, heavy beast can be seen.
name: Dark Opening in the Vegetation

desc:
A cherished garden has been planted here. There is a gazebo in the far eastern
corner. There are rows of rose bushes, mostly grouped by colour. Between the
rows, there is soft lush green grass, soft enough to lay down on. There is a
bird bath located in the centre of the rows, and a small clearing and a few
benches to rest on. This garden is surrounded on three sides by a huge stone
wall, too tall to climb.
name: A Rose Garden

desc:
The wastelands sprawl out around you in all directions, covered with gritty sand
and broken boulders as far as the eye can see. A fine web of dark cracks can be
seen along its flat surface, made by the drought. Nearby, to the north stands a
giant, black silhouette of a tree, strangely alone in the flatness.
name: Hard Wastelands

desc:
The mountains rise tall with high peaks to the north and east, with terrain
cluttered with huge boulders and loose scree, making travel difficult. The
passage east and southwards are steep, but north and west looks impossible to
climb. Below, to the south the mountains break first into rocky, barren hills
and then onwards to a large mountain valley. To the southeast the mighty tower
Orthanc splits the horizon, and plain to see is the ring of Isengard surrounding
it with all its strength. A small trail of hoof-tracks leads upwards.
name: Misty Mountains
